column2: Tap to Give NFC Plate for Churches (100-199 Pack)
column3: Custom-printed NFC tap-to-give plate for churches. Mount on pew backs or chairs — congregants tap their phone to open your church's giving page instantly. No app required. Works with iPhone 6+ and Android 4.4+. Compatible with Tithely, Pushpay, Givelify, Donorbox, Anedot, Subsplash, and any giving platform with a URL. 4-inch (100mm) diameter, durable waterproof PVC, NTAG215 NFC chip, 3M adhesive back included. Volume pricing: 100-199 plates at $4.50 each.
